moment: I was thinking about those cakes. I wanted to make it that dinner party. The small ones with three layers that Evan made me not make, and then they were having a cake decorating party that Sweet Lady Jane, decorating those exact kind of cakes.
concepts: a small three-layer round mini cake being piped by an icing bag, with a tiny tag reading 'the exact one'
a three-layer mini cake whose top layer is drawn in dotted 'imagined' outline while the two lower layers are solid, one piped rosette bridging them

moment: I came to the conclusion that Sandy Greenberg must have been really smart, and then it turned out Mommy had been talking about that with Sandra and Cory at the party in New York.
concepts: a single glowing lightbulb whose glass is split into two interlocking puzzle pieces that fit perfectly, a tiny tag on it reading "Sandy = smart"
a graduation-cap-wearing brain with a small nametag reading "SANDY GREENBERG" and a check mark beside it

moment: I saw an owl on the fence between my house and Peron's, and I had been thinking about all the recent owl sightings earlier that day.
concepts: a simple owl perched on a horizontal fence rail

moment: Sandy called in the one minute while I had my phone off airplane mode to download a photo off Instagram.
concepts: a phone screen showing an airplane-mode airplane icon fading out, with an incoming call labeled 'Sandy' popping up in the same instant
an hourglass with a single grain mid-fall, and a small ringing phone handset squeezing through its narrow neck

moment: Daddy told me his story about writing an essay thinking someone's features in a short story were describing England.
concepts: the outline of England with a little face drawn on it — two eyes, a nose, and a smile placed within the map shape
an open essay page with a small doodle of England's outline that has eyes and a smiling mouth, a pen resting across it

moment: The girl at Sweet Lady Jane gave me a weird looking piece and I said it was body positivity cause she gave me extra.
concepts: a lopsided, lumpy cake slice with an extra-thick uneven layer, a tiny heart drawn on its frosting
a plump irregular cake slice on a plate with a small hand-lettered tag reading 'extra' tied to the fork

moment: I ate my pie next to friends who seemed to be arguing — but actually one was comforting the other.
concepts: a slice of pie on a plate, with a jagged lightning-bolt scribble above it that curls at its end into a small heart
a fork holding a bite of pie, with a tiny storm cloud beside it whose raindrops are little hearts

moment: This really pretty girl was waiting on the couch looking sour. Then a snarky looking boy pulled up in a nice new black truck. Of course it was her ride.
concepts: a shiny black pickup truck with a single sour-faced lemon riding in the passenger seat
a couch with a sour lemon on the cushion, tiny keys to a black truck resting beside it

moment: It was hard to believe someone would leave a timer on for so long, and then I realized I had set it.
concepts: a round kitchen timer with a single fingerprint smudged on its start button, a small magnifying glass hovering over the fingerprint like a detective clue
a kitchen timer with a little handwritten paper tag hanging off it reading 'set by: me'
an egg timer shaped like a hen, its dial wound all the way around to a big red long time, one tiny sweat drop on the dial

moment: I got caught robbing a bank.
concepts: a burlap money sack with a big dollar sign, one handcuff clicked around its neck-tie
a ski mask with a small price-tag reading 'oops' hanging off it

moment: I met a girl in the crosswalk and we became friends.
concepts: a crosswalk whose white stripes curve up and interlink in the middle like two clasped hands
a friendship bracelet woven from black-and-white crosswalk stripes, tied in a bow
a crosswalk with two of its stripes bending together to form a heart at the center

moment: The cookie crumbs were for looking around in bed, and then I found the poem to go with it.
concepts: a bitten cookie with a trail of crumbs scattering out to the right, the crumbs turning into three short handwritten lines of a poem
a small pillow dusted with cookie crumbs, the crumbs arranged into the shape of a tiny folded poem card resting on it

moment: I kept seeing the same short girl in different places, trying on clothes.
concepts: a dress on a hanger where the hanger's hook is shaped like a map location pin
a small clothing size tag reading 'XS' with a tiny compass rose printed on it

moment: I got two samples from Pinkberry.
concepts: two tiny frozen-yogurt sample spoons, each holding a small swirl, crossed at the handles
a single small paper sample cup filled with a swirl of frozen yogurt, a tiny handwritten 'x2' beside it
one frozen-yogurt swirl shaped like a little smile inside a mini tasting spoon

moment: I got my app to work.
concepts: a smartphone whose screen shows a single big green checkmark, with a tiny 'RUN' button glowing beside it
a little ladybug (as a 'bug') lying on its back with a small bandage on it, next to a phone showing a checkmark
a circular loading spinner arrow whose leading tip has curled into a checkmark

moment: I figured out how to do the thing with my mind.
concepts: a lightbulb whose glass bulb is shaped like a brain, glowing 'on' with a few little rays
a tangled scribble of string on the left that straightens into one clean line on the right
a keyhole shaped like a brain with a small key turned inside it
